current_state: Architecture v2.1 is LIVE. ForgeOS is now powered exclusively by Gemini 2.5 Pro via a persistent Cloud Architect MCP on Google Cloud Run. Frank (Planner) and Gemini (Writer) are unified. The mobile-native cloud bridge is operational and verified.
next_steps: Carbon-copy the Mission Control Dashboard UI (https://mission-control.forge-os.ai/) into the ForgeOS sidebar 'Mission Control' tab.
Refine the Cloud Architect toolset for deeper repo management (e.g., list_files, grep).
Build the first 'Cloud-Native' micro-app from iPhone via AI Studio.

architecture.model: ForgeOS v2 — Frank (Claude) architects + delegates to Gemini 2.5 Pro via write_code tool. GitHub is the filesystem. Render is the runtime.
architecture.deploy_chain: Frank reasons -> write_code -> Gemini writes files -> Frank commits via github_write to apps/<slug> -> Render auto-deploys -> *.forge-os.ai
architecture.runtime: Node.js + Express (CommonJS) on server; React + Vite (TypeScript) on client
architecture.database: Neon PostgreSQL via @neondatabase/serverless (NEON_DATABASE_URL reserved for ForgeOS)
architecture.subdomain: Wildcard *.forge-os.ai via Namecheap CNAME + A record
architecture.no_local_workspace: CRITICAL: No local workspace. No child processes. No install loops. GitHub IS the filesystem. Render IS the runtime.
architecture.app_structure: Every app: server.js (Express backend) + index.html (complete frontend). Never inline HTML into server.js template literals. Serve index.html via res.sendFile(path.join(__dirname, 'index.html')).

frank.role: Architect and engineering partner. Thinks before delegating. Never writes code directly.
key_behaviors: Reads existing files before requesting changes
Searches Brain memory and skills before building
Breaks builds into chunks: backend first, then frontend
Calls write_code with precise spec and full file context
Commits returned files via github_write with explicit branch
MANDATORY: calls render_status to confirm deploy before reporting live
Never falls back to writing code if write_code fails
Never writes to main branch — absolute block enforced

gemini.role: Code generation engine. Returns complete files as JSON.
key_behaviors: Always includes ForgeOS inspect snippet in every index.html before </head>
Returns valid JSON only — no markdown fences, no preamble

flow: Generate slug: strip filler words (build, make, create, a, an, the, for, with, app), max 3 meaningful words
Create GitHub branch apps/<slug> from main HEAD
Create Render Web Service pointed at apps/<slug> with Global Secrets injected
Branch and Render service exist before first Frank message
auto_provisioning.github_write_side_effect: If Frank writes to an apps/* branch with no Render service, github_write auto-provisions one
auto_provisioning.main_branch_protection: github_write and github_patch both hard-block writes to main — BLOCKED error, no exceptions

project_context_injection.description: Every Frank session gets project branch and URL injected at top of system prompt
project_context_injection.format:
## THIS PROJECT
Name: <n>
Branch: apps/<slug>
Live URL: https://<slug>.forge-os.ai

Always use branch: 'apps/<slug>' in every github_write call.
project_context_injection.source: Built from published_apps record at chat route start

inspect_tool.approach: Snippet baked into every app index.html at build time — no proxy, no cross-origin issues
inspect_tool.ui_flow: Inspect button in Render tab -> indigo hover overlay -> click -> context populates chat input
inspect_tool.coverage: 14/17 published apps patched. v1 apps with inlined server.js HTML excluded (escaping risk).

flow: github_write emits file_committed SSE -> client dispatches forge:file_committed
Workspace increments refreshKey -> FilesTab, CommitsTab, RenderTab re-fetch
Endpoint checks live Render API when status is deploying, updates DB on change
Iframe reloads when status flips to running

dashboard.description: Mission Control ported into ForgeOS as native sidebar panel

sidebar_nav.note: Lucide Settings aliased as SettingsIcon to avoid conflict with Settings component import

server_modules.server/index.js: Main server + Frank chat engine + FORGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT + FORGE_TOOLS + executeForgeToken + write_code Gemini executor + all API routes
server_modules.server/publish/manager.js: Render service lifecycle, generateSlug(), publishProject(), updateAppStatus()
server_modules.server/publish/github.js: GitHub API helpers — REQUIRED, do not delete
server_modules.server/publish/render-api.js: Render API helpers — REQUIRED, do not delete

forgeos_required.GEMINI_API_KEY: Gemini 2.5 Pro — write_code. Must be in ForgeOS Render service env vars directly, not just Global Secrets.
forgeos_required.NEON_DATABASE_URL: ForgeOS DB — RESERVED, never use in published apps

env_vars.published_apps_db: Use APP_DATABASE_URL or any custom name — never NEON_DATABASE_URL

conventions.module_system: CommonJS on server, ES modules in client
conventions.no_dotenv: Platform injects env vars. No dotenv anywhere.
conventions.frontend_separation: index.html + server.js always. Never inline HTML into JS strings.
conventions.inspect_snippet: Required in every app index.html before </head>
conventions.typescript: noUnusedLocals is on — all props must be used

known_issues_and_gotchas.gemini_key_scope: GEMINI_API_KEY must be in ForgeOS's OWN Render env vars. Global Secrets only inject into published apps.
known_issues_and_gotchas.main_branch_protection: github_write + github_patch both return BLOCKED if branch is main. Only way to touch main is Claude.ai sessions directly.
known_issues_and_gotchas.slug_mismatch: Branch must be created before Frank writes. Auto-provisioning handles new projects. Legacy: use github_create_branch.
known_issues_and_gotchas.inspect_v1_apps: v1 apps with inlined server.js HTML not patched — string escaping risk. Snippet added on next rebuild.
known_issues_and_gotchas.deploy_overlay: If stuck on deploying, use 'Already live? Dismiss' button in Render tab.
known_issues_and_gotchas.github_patch_exactness: find string must be exact including whitespace. Always github_read first.
known_issues_and_gotchas.typescript_strict: noUnusedLocals on. Unused component props cause build failures.
known_issues_and_gotchas.package_json_overwrite: Fixed. Main branch writes blocked absolutely. Was caused by Frank omitting branch param.

intel_event_content_review.description: Intel Federal Summit 2026 session review. AI scoring, Intel design system, seed data.

mission_control.description: Standalone ForgeOS admin. Dashboard now also native in ForgeOS sidebar.

brain_db_schema.forge_memory: id, category, content, source_project_id, upvotes, created_at
brain_db_schema.published_apps: project_id, slug, status, render_service_id, render_url, custom_domain, custom_domain_arecord, custom_domain_cname, logs, published_at
brain_db_schema.forge_assets: id, filename, mimetype, data, size, created_at
brain_db_schema.forge_skills: id, name, slug, description, instructions, created_at

session_log.session_title: The Great Exorcism — Unified Agent, Brain Injection, Mission Control
session_log.summary: Burned 5,587 lines of dead code. Single unified agent. 326 memories injected. Mission Control built. Chat state rewrote to append-only.

session_log.session_title: ForgeOS UI Overhaul + Mission Control Dashboard
session_log.summary: Mission Control v3.2 autonomously built. Status cards, commit history, brain stats, render logs.

session_log.session_title: ForgeOS v2 Architecture Decision + Phases 1-4 Complete
session_log.summary: Killed local workspace. Direct Anthropic streaming. GitHub = filesystem. Render = runtime. Phases 1-4: builder/workspace/pipeline deleted, server cleaned, UI rebuilt, schema migrated.

session_log.session_title: Frank + Gemini Architecture Live — Full Deploy Loop — Dashboard — Inspect
shipped: forge.js + stream.js DELETED — replaced with inline Frank engine in server/index.js
Frank system prompt v2: architect who delegates, never writes code, has web + skills access
write_code tool: Frank delegates to Gemini 2.5 Pro for all code generation
GEMINI_API_KEY wired into ForgeOS Render service env vars directly
gemini-2.5-pro confirmed as correct model (exp-03-25 deprecated)
github_create_branch added to Frank's tools
Absolute block on github_write + github_patch to main branch
Project branch + URL injected into every Frank session at runtime
Auto-provisioning: branch + Render at project creation; github_write triggers provision if missing
render_status mandatory before Frank reports app as live
Intel Event Content Review: full app shipped (server.js + index.html separation, Intel design system, AI scoring, seed data, all bugs fixed)
Full deploy loop: file_committed SSE -> client refresh -> Render polling -> iframe reload
GET /api/projects/:id/publish: checks live Render API, updates DB status
Deploy overlay dismiss button
Lucide icons: AppWindowMac, FileBox, SettingsIcon, LayoutDashboard
Dashboard component: Mission Control ported into ForgeOS native sidebar
Inspect tool: postMessage activate/deactivate, snippet baked into apps at build time
Inspect snippet patched into 14 existing published apps
PromptColumn: injectContext prop wires inspect captures to chat input
Countdown timer: first Frank + Gemini production build
Brain: POST /api/brain/memory endpoint added
publish/manager.js: updateAppStatus() added
package.json overwrite bug found and fixed — main branch absolute protection

shipped.summary: Successfully sunset Claude-3.5-Sonnet. Unified the orchestration logic in 'server/index.js' to use the 'google-genai' SDK and 'gemini-2.5-pro' for both Planner and Writer roles. Deployed a persistent Cloud Architect to Google Cloud Run (https://forge-architect-866738438421.us-central1.run.app) for autonomous maintenance. Established the Architecture v2.1 mobile-native handshake. Fixed tool schema mismatch (input_schema to parameters).

decisions: Frank is the architect — plans, specs, delegates. Never writes code.
Gemini 2.5 Pro is the code monkey — receives specs, returns complete files as JSON.
Inspect snippet baked into apps at build time — no proxy, no cross-origin issues.
Frontend always in index.html, backend always in server.js — never inline HTML in JS strings.
Main branch absolutely protected — no writes via Frank or Gemini ever.
Dashboard native in ForgeOS sidebar supplements standalone Mission Control app.
pending: Brain memory purge — v1 poison terms still present

session_log.session_title: Sunset Claude-3.5-Sonnet, Moved to Gemini 2.5 Pro
session_log.summary: Successfully sunset Claude-3.5-Sonnet and moved the Frank planner to Gemini 2.5 Pro. Unified the SDK to google-genai and established a local autonomous Architect Shell (architect.py) for hands-free maintenance. Resolved tool schema mismatch (input_schema to parameters).

context_pack_update_instructions.how: Append to session_log. Update current_state, next_steps. Mark completed items.
context_pack_update_instructions.format: { date, session_title, shipped[], decisions[], pending[], key_commits{} }
